---
name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in CodeVista
title: "[BUG] "
labels: bug
assignees: ''
---

## Bug Description
A clear description of what the bug is.

## Steps to Reproduce
1. Run: `codevista analyze /path/to/project`
2. See error: ...

## Expected Behavior
What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior
What actually happened.

## Environment
- OS: [e.g., Linux, macOS, Windows]
- Python version: [e.g., 3.11]
- CodeVista version: [e.g., 1.0.0]
- Project language: [e.g., Python, JavaScript]

## Additional Context
Screenshots, stack traces, or any other helpful information.

## Minimal Reproducible Example
If possible, provide a minimal example that reproduces the bug.
